channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: North America’s largest commuter rail system shuts down as workers strike
item.description: North America’s largest commuter rail system has shut down after unionized workers went on strike. The Long Island Rail Road in New York ceased operations early Saturday morning as five unions representing about half its workforce walked off the job.

item.title: USS Ford returns home after 11-month deployment supporting the Iran war and Maduro’s capture
Sen. Cassidy knocked out of Louisiana Republican primary as Trump-backed Letlow, Fleming make runoff
